LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT PATRICIA BROTMAN'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF CAYLEY KUTLER'S DEPOSITION. NO APPEARANCES, THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: THE REPORT AND RECOMMENDATION OF THE JUDGE PRO TEM IS ADOPTED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL AND FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING AND THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; NOT REPORTED. (302/EPS)

MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Compel Plaintiff Cayley Kutler?S Deposition; Memorandum In Support Thereof; Declaration Of Kendal E. Fletcher
Off Calendar Apr-20-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT PATRICIA BROTMAN's Motion To Compel Plaintiff Cayley Kutler's Deposition.

No appearances, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

The report and recommendation of the judge pro tem is adopted. Defendant's motion to compel and for sanctions is denied.

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and that complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
